home.title: DilUp — Learn English online with a tutor who fits you
home.description: DilUp is Azerbaijan's online language platform. Find your perfect English tutor, set your budget, and start speaking from the very first lesson.

copy.sueHeadline: Speak English with confidence — in meetings, interviews, and everyday life.
copy.neaHeadline: Build real confidence speaking English, step by step, at your pace.
copy.andrewHeadline: IELTS and business English coaching that gets real results.

certificates.TEFL: Teaching English as a Foreign Language

sue-l.bio: Hi, I'm Sue! Native English speaker with 20+ years in business. I'll help you speak naturally, sound professional, and stop translating in your head.
sue-l.about: Hey there! I'm Sue, a native English speaker from the US with an MBA and 20+ years of experience in healthcare marketing. I specialize in business English, job interview prep, and everyday conversation. My lessons are relaxed but focused — we'll work on real situations you actually face, not just textbook dialogues. Let's get you talking with confidence!
sue-l.highlight: Great for conversation practice — strong focus on vocabulary, listening, and real-life English.
sue-l.reviewSummary: Students love how Sue tailors every lesson to their goals. She explains things clearly, corrects mistakes on the spot, and keeps lessons fun and well-organized.

reviews.0: Sue is an amazing tutor! Super professional and always has great strategies to help you improve.
reviews.1: Honestly one of the best teachers I've had — patient, encouraging, and genuinely cares about your progress.
reviews.2: Lessons are well-structured, easy to follow, and never boring.
reviews.3: I always learn something new, and the feedback after each lesson is super helpful.

nea-p.bio: Hi, I'm Nea from Finland! I help students speak more naturally with friendly corrections, clear goals, and lots of speaking practice.
nea-p.about: Hi! I'm Nea, a CELTA-certified English teacher from Finland. I love working with beginners and anyone who feels nervous speaking English. My lessons are relaxed and encouraging — we'll focus on what you actually need: daily conversation, travel English, or just building the confidence to speak without overthinking.
nea-p.highlight: Great match if you want patient, judgment-free speaking practice.
nea-p.reviewSummary: Students describe Nea as warm, patient, and incredibly easy to talk to. A great pick if you want to build everyday confidence.

reviews.0: Nea is so kind and easy to talk to — never makes you feel embarrassed about mistakes.
reviews.1: I finally feel comfortable speaking English at work, thanks to Nea!

andrew-s.bio: Expert IELTS and business English coaching — speaking, writing, and professional communication. Book a trial and let's build your plan.
andrew-s.about: I'm Andrew, a DELTA-qualified English teacher from the UK. My lessons are direct, practical, and focused on measurable progress — perfect if you're preparing for IELTS, want sharper business writing, or need to sound more confident in meetings and interviews.
andrew-s.highlight: Strong choice for IELTS speaking and writing practice.
andrew-s.reviewSummary: Students praise Andrew's direct feedback, smart exam strategies, and well-organized lessons.

reviews.0: Andrew's IELTS feedback is incredibly clear and actually useful.
reviews.1: Great structure, and my business vocabulary has improved so much.

howItWorks.title: How <mark>DilUp</mark> works
howItWorks.step1Text: Filter by price, availability and specialty. Browse profiles and intro videos.
howItWorks.step2Text: Talk to your tutor in a live video lesson. No software to install.
howItWorks.step3Text: Keep your schedule, do the homework and see real results.

guarantee.title: A tutor match, guaranteed
guarantee.text: If your first lesson isn't the right fit, get a free trial with another tutor. No risk at all.

becomeTutor.title: Become a tutor, set your own rate
becomeTutor.text: Teach whenever and wherever you want. You're in control of your earnings — you set the price.

footer.tagline: DilUp connects learners with tutors who fit their goals, budget and schedule through live, one-to-one lessons.

onboarding.introText: Share your goal, level and weekly availability so we can shape the right tutor shortlist.

onboarding.loadingText: We are turning your answers into useful search filters.

visual.pathText: Goals, schedule and tutor fit in one path

signup.title: Almost there. See {subject} tutors matched to you.
signup.text: Create a free account to keep your answers, unlock the shortlist and book a trial lesson.
signup.legal: By continuing, you agree to DilUp terms and privacy policy.

actions.missing: Complete the required fields to continue.

start.title: Build your DilUp profile in a clear step-by-step flow.
start.text: This flow helps you create a profile students can trust: who you are, what you teach, how you teach and when you are available.

about.title: About
about.text: Start creating your public tutor profile. Your progress will be automatically saved as you complete each section. You can return at any time to finish your registration.

photo.title: Add a clear photo that builds trust.
photo.text: Your photo creates the first impression. Choose a real, tidy image where your face is easy to see.

certification.title: Show the documents that support your teaching skills.
certification.text: Certificates are not always required, but they help during review and make your profile stronger.

education.title: Add your education and subject background.
education.text: University, courses or teacher training details give students helpful context.

description.title: Write the profile in your own voice.
description.text: Your text should explain your teaching style, experience and what a student can expect from the first lesson.

video.title: Show your teaching energy with a short video.
video.text: Students want to hear you before choosing. A natural 30-60 second video is enough.

availability.title: Choose when you can teach.
availability.text: Accurate availability means fewer cancellations and easier bookings.

price.title: Set your rate for a 50-minute lesson.
price.text: You choose the price. DilUp is pay-per-lesson, with no subscription package selling.

profile.title: Profile
profile.text: We collect your name, language, specialties and experience.

proof.title: Trust
proof.text: Photo, certificates and education make your profile more credible.

video.title: Introduction
video.text: Video, schedule and price directly affect the student's decision.

hints.headline: For example: Structured English lessons for speaking confidence.
hints.intro: Clearly explain who you teach and how the first lesson will work.

rules.face: Make sure your face is clear and centered.
rules.light: Use natural light and a calm background.
rules.plain: Avoid logos, heavy filters and group photos.
rules.current: Choose a real photo that reflects how you look now.
rules.solo: You should be the only person in the photo.

certification.helper: Certificate #{number} will be considered during profile review.

video.linkPrompt: Have a pre-recorded video on YouTube or Vimeo?
video.requirementsText: Make sure your video meets the requirements to get approved.

rules.sound: Keep your sound clear and background quiet.
rules.promise: Say who you help and how your lessons work.
rules.invite: End by inviting the student to the first lesson.
rules.lighting: Use good lighting and a neutral background.
rules.stable: Keep the camera stable so the video does not shake.

price.label: 50-minute lesson
price.note: You can change the rate later from your profile.
price.payoutText: This example uses DilUp's 25% platform commission.

preview.title: The headline students see will appear here
preview.text: As you complete the profile text, this card becomes more realistic.
preview.note: This application is saved locally. When the backend is connected, the same data will be written to the Supabase tutor profile.

submitted.title: Your application draft is ready.
submitted.text: The flow is complete. Next we can connect it to the Supabase tutor profile and add admin review status.

review.title: Review
review.text: The team checks your profile information.

message.title: Edits
message.text: If needed, we ask for extra details.

live.title: Live
live.text: After approval, your profile becomes visible to students.

savedTutors.title: Saved tutors
savedTutors.subtitle: {count} tutor(s) saved for later.
savedTutors.emptyText: Use the heart button on tutor cards or profiles to build your shortlist.
